_meta.source: TTS mod 1210887127 class boards, pixel-transcribed from the 10 board tile images (scale-9.25 Custom_Tiles). Board GUID -> class mapped by table position against the named '<Class> Moveable Healthbar' tiles and named class minis (rows z=-53.3 and z=-73.8).
_meta.calibration: Herald tier table matches the core rulebook p.15 photo exactly (STR 12/19/28/37, DEX 11/17/26/34, INT 8/12/20/29, FAI 13/22/31/40). Taunt values across the 10 classes form a complete 1..10 permutation.
_meta.statTiers: Per stat: [Base, Tier 1, Tier 2, Tier 3] as printed. Campaign-only Tier 4 = 40 for every stat (core p.33), not printed on boards.
_meta.enduranceBoxes: Counted 10 on every board (sharp crops verified on Warrior, Herald, Sorcerer, Cleric; visual count on the rest). Matches core p.20.
_meta.tokens: Boards carry one slot each for Estus Flask, Luck, Heroic Action, Ember. No class varies any token count; estus = 1 charge per rest, luck = 1 reroll token. No luck-dice or dodge-dice value is printed on any board; dodge dice come entirely from equipment (core p.25).
_meta.heroicAction: Text verbatim from the board. Inline printed icons are rendered as [bracketed] glosses: [node] = node-AoE attack icon (filled dot in ring), [range 1]/[range inf] = attack-range icon with value, [1 blue die]/[1 black die] = die icons. 'Once per spark' = once until the party rests (heroic token flips ready on rest, core p.11/p.15).
_meta.startingEquipment: Cross-referenced to treasures.json starting-<class> deck ids; not re-transcribed here. Core 4 classes total 13 cards (matches core p.6), expansion 6 total 23.
_meta.boardImage: Cache-munged filename under C:/Users/chase/Documents/My Games/Tabletop Simulator/Mods/Images/ (strip non-alphanumerics from the URL). Warrior/Knight/Herald/Assassin boards are Drive-hosted 2815x2134; the rest are Steam-CDN scans.
_meta.minis: Only 7 class figures exist in the save: 5 named Custom_Models (Warrior, Knight, Herald, Assassin, Sorcerer) plus 2 unnamed Custom_Models at the row-2 mini offsets, identified BY POSITION as Deprived (b38e43) and Mercenary (045693). Thief, Cleric, and Pyromancer have no mini or standee anywhere in the mod (miniMesh null).
_meta.levelUpCosts: Not printed on boards; rulebook constants: standard 2/4/8 souls (core p.15), campaign 4/8/16/20 with Tier 4 (core p.33). No class stat/reference cards or level-up card decks exist in the mod; the tier table on each board is the only level-up data.
flags: MISSING MINI: thief, cleric, pyromancer - no model or standee in the save; engine needs substitutes.

POSITION-INFERRED: deprived and mercenary mini identity read from table layout (unnamed objects); deprived diffuse is 'custom_1', mercenary diffuse is 'bandit'. Confirm by mesh render during extraction.

heroicAction.name: Berserk Charge
heroicAction.text: Once per spark during his activation, the Warrior may move one node without spending stamina. The next range 0 attack he makes costs 0 stamina and gains [node].

heroicAction.name: Stand Fast
heroicAction.text: Once per spark after making a block roll, the Knight may roll an additional blue die [1 blue die] and add it to the roll.

heroicAction.name: Perseverance
heroicAction.text: Once per spark during his activation, the Herald may use Perseverance. When he does, each character gains 2 stamina.

heroicAction.name: Backstab
heroicAction.text: Once per spark after making a successful dodge, the Assassin may attack the enemy he dodged. The attack does not cost stamina but must have range to the enemy.

heroicAction.name: Spell Fury
heroicAction.text: Once per spark when the Sorcerer makes a magic attack, it gains [range inf] and its Stamina cost is reduced by 3.

heroicAction.name: Lucky Break
heroicAction.text: Once per spark during his activation, the Thief may use Lucky Break. When he does, he removes 2 black and 2 red cubes from his endurance bar and flips his Luck token to the ready side.

classes.name: Deprived

heroicAction.name: Combat Versatility
heroicAction.text: Once per spark at the start of his activation, the Deprived may change equipment as if he had visited Blacksmith Andre.

classes.miniNote: identity inferred from table position (unnamed object)

heroicAction.name: Keep the Faith
heroicAction.text: Once per spark during her activation, the Cleric may use Keep the Faith. When she does, each character within [range 1] removes 2 red cubes from their endurance bar.

classes.name: Mercenary

heroicAction.name: Rapid Strike
heroicAction.text: Once per spark during their activation, the Mercenary may make an attack that costs 0 Stamina even if they already used that Weapon during their activation.

classes.miniNote: identity inferred from table position (unnamed object)

heroicAction.name: Explosive Firepower
heroicAction.text: Once per spark when the Pyromancer makes a magic attack, it gains [1 black die].
